turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Billing support, this is Alex speaking. How can I help you out?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Heads up, we do record these calls for training and quality.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'll need to verify a couple of details first. What's the name on the account?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, name and email are both the ones on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I got charged twice this month and I only have one subscription.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Give me a second to check the billing history on this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Right, that's exactly what I'm talking about.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Right, that's exactly what I'm talking about.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're all set. Thanks for your patience, and have a good one.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's everything. Thanks for the help.
